top_signals.title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
top_signals.summary: Dune data shows Tether's USDT has become crypto’s dominant payments stablecoin while Circle's USDC powers DeFi, highlighting how blockchain choice shapes stablecoin use.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Farage by-election gambit undercut by rivals’ refusal to participate
top_signals.summary: Kemi Badenoch said Conservatives would not field candidate in ‘fake’ vote that comes amid growing scrutiny of Reform UK leader
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Saudi Arabia blocking payments to UAE accounts, businesses say
top_signals.summary: Transfers from kingdom to companies and individuals in Dubai repeatedly returned or delayed in a sign of economic tension
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: A quick guide to Nigel Farage’s gamble

top_signals.title: High-spending online gamblers will face financial checks in UK
top_signals.summary: People with net deposits of more than £1,000 a day will be assessed by companies for risk of vulnerability
